title: Time Of Day Indicator
description: Adds a hud label that tells what the time is in game.
body:
# Time Of Day Indicator
This modification adds only one thing.
A timer that tells the user(you) which time it is!

This will help for knowing which time it is.
like when it is night for if you are mining.

Also to access the config menu do these steps.
- 1: Go to "mods"
- 2: double click the mod

# NOTE:
YOU NEED CLOTH CONFIG AND MOD MENU TO CHANGE THE POSITION OF THE LABEL
